{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ruler constructs
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The course contains earth-aspect [[Ruler constructs]] that can rebuild stone pillars.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ruler constructs]] automatically intercept objects like trees thrown at [[Moongrave]]'s walls.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
